definition.definition: An explicit rule G which, given an allowed pre-role source universe U and only non-leaking source fields, outputs the seam carrier 13-14 as a necessary construction result rather than as a post-hoc selection.
definition.short_form: A generator is satisfied when a pre-role rule produces 13-14 without using 13, 14, slot14, return-hub role, anchor labels, 180-cut status, target labels, or post-hoc fingerprints.

distinctions.handle: 13-14 is structurally nameable after some grammar is known.
distinctions.generator: 13-14 is produced by an earlier admissible rule.

required_criteria.satisfaction_test: G uses only declared pre-role source universe U and non-leaking source fields.
G outputs the seam carrier object, not merely a property that recognizes it.
generated set equals target set, with no missing and no extra carriers.
G does not depend on target labels, endpoint identity, later roles, cut grammar, or post-hoc fingerprints.
G declares local, family, or global scope before evaluation.
A failed generator search may close as a bounded negative only if it states the tested family.

forbidden_inputs: slot14 label unless independently generated before this rule
return-hub role unless independently generated before this rule
anchor labels unless independently generated before this rule
180-cut grammar unless independently generated before this rule
exact selector discovered by looking at the target first
post-hoc scalar fingerprint used as a cause

allowed_generator_scopes.description: Given the F0001 chamber source packet, G generates the F0001 seam.
For every comparable chamber in the tested family, G generates the corresponding seam.
Across the full carrier universe, G generates all and only seams of this type.

phase_conclusion_rule.generator_found: A non-leaking pre-role rule constructs the seam under one declared scope.
phase_conclusion_rule.generator_not_found_in_tested_family: All exact pre-role selectors in the tested family remain fingerprints or handles, and no constructive rule is promoted.

current_reading.after_053: The weak edge is the return-hub seam.
current_reading.after_054: The seam is identifiable but not yet generated.
current_reading.after_055: Pre-role fingerprints find the seam but still do not generate it.
current_reading.after_056: The generator definition is planted and the current phase has a formal finish line.

keeper: A fingerprint finds the seam. A generator must produce it.
